productName: Torus - Rosin Cold Cure - Chem De La Sour - 1g
description: This hybrid rosin is the connoisseur's clean dab: Chem De La Sour coaxed into honey-gold oil by heat and pressure alone, with nothing washed out and nothing added in. A premium solventless experience, a tangy, mouth-watering sour flavor, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience.
